nodeIdMap.literal: "Select *,#(lf)#(lf)concat((UPPER(REPLACE(CLIENT_MANAGER_QUOTED,'-',''))), #(lf)LEFT(CAST(DTE AS DATE),4)+LEFT(RIGHT(CAST(DTE AS DATE),5),2)) AS AGENT_KEY,#(lf)concat((UPPER(REPLACE(CLIENT_DIRECTOR,'-',''))), #(lf)LEFT(CAST(DTE AS DATE),4)+LEFT(RIGHT(CAST(DTE AS DATE),5),2)) AS CD_AGENT_KEY#(lf)#(lf)from V_INVOICE_BOOKING_2022"
